title: Datadog Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
text: Datadog Q1 2026 Earnings Summary. Financial Performance: Revenue reached 1.01 billion, up 32 percent year-over-year, accelerating from 29 percent last quarter. ARR surpassed 4 billion with accelerating growth each month. Customer Metrics: Total customers approximately 33,200 up from approximately 3,500 year ago. High-value customers 100K ARR: 4,550, generating approximately 90 percent of total ARR. Platform adoption strengthened: 56 percent use 4 or more products up from 51 percent. Profitability: Free cash flow 289 million with 29 percent margin. Operating income 223 million with 22 percent non-GAAP margin. Gross margin 80.2 percent. Key Business Drivers: AI Momentum. Over 6,500 customers using AI integrations representing 20 percent of customer base and 80 percent of ARR. Large Deals: Management highlighted seven and eight-figure annualized deals with two global AI research teams focusing on GPU monitoring for training workloads. Expansion Initiatives: Achieved FedRAMP High certification. Announced UK data center launch. Forward Guidance: Q2 2026: Revenue 1.07-1.08 billion representing 29-31 percent YoY growth. FY 2026: Revenue 4.3-4.34 billion representing 25-27 percent growth. EPS 2.36-2.44.
